name: example-app
description: The example application workspace: simulation lib + terminal TUI + browser app over one purs-backend-es build

scripts.bundle: npm run build:ps && vite build --config web/vite.config.mjs
scripts.simulate: npm run build:ps && cd ../.. && node packages/example/terminal/run.mjs
scripts.test: npm run build:ps && cd ../.. && node packages/example/lib/run-tests.mjs
